entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) used for nitrogen determination in leaf, stem, and seed samples.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cajanus cajan L.) used for nitrogen determination in leaf, stem, and seed samples.

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in plant tissues and grain samples.

entities.name: HYDROGEN PEROXIDE DIGESTION
entities.description: A digestion procedure using hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) as an alternative to catalysts for nitrogen determination.

entities.name: MICROKJELDAHL
entities.description: A nitrogen determination method (MKJ) that can use mercury as a catalyst.

entities.name: TECHNICON AUTO ANALYSER
entities.description: A nitrogen determination method (TAA) that can use selenium as a catalyst.

entities.name: MERCURY
entities.description: A catalyst used in nitrogen digestion procedures, noted for cost and health hazards.

entities.name: SELENIUM
entities.description: A catalyst used in nitrogen digestion procedures, noted for cost and health hazards.
